extracted.title: VCP Meter Underperformance -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
As previously posted, Valley Crossing Pipeline's, LLC (VCP) system has limited ability to absorb due pipeline imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. VCP requires its interconnects to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical deliveries. VCP continues to see physical receipts less than scheduled quantities at some of its interconnects:

Loc 40832 - WHISTLER PIPELINE, Nueces County, TX

If immediate action is not taken by the meter operator, VCP will make the necessary reductions for Gas Day January 26, 2026.

VCP will continue to monitor performance at this meter for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
